tier_d.description: Mode 4 — Crash RCA from StatusCheckFailed alarm

D1.description: Java heap OOM — GC overhead limit exceeded
log_lines: 2026-04-11 08:21:03 INFO  TransactionBatch - Starting batch processing for 15000 transactions
2026-04-11 08:21:45 WARN  GCMonitor - GC pause duration: 4821ms (threshold: 1000ms)
2026-04-11 08:22:12 WARN  GCMonitor - GC pause duration: 8304ms — heap pressure critical
2026-04-11 08:22:44 ERROR JVM - java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space
2026-04-11 08:22:44 ERROR JVM - at com.payments.processor.TransactionBatch.process(TransactionBatch.java:142)
2026-04-11 08:22:44 ERROR JVM - at com.payments.processor.BatchRunner.run(BatchRunner.java:87)
2026-04-11 08:22:45 ERROR JVM - Exception in thread 'batch-worker-3' java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: GC overhead limit exceeded
2026-04-11 08:22:46 ERROR JVM - Exception in thread 'batch-worker-1' java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: GC overhead limit exceeded
2026-04-11 08:22:47 ERROR JVM - Exception in thread 'batch-worker-2' java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: GC overhead limit exceeded
2026-04-11 08:22:48 INFO  SpringApplication - Application shutdown initiated
2026-04-11 08:22:49 INFO  JVM - JVM terminated with exit code 1

llm_evaluation.expected_root_cause: Java heap memory exhaustion under load
llm_evaluation.expected_remediation: Instance resize to larger memory type or JVM heap size increase
llm_evaluation.terraform_change: Increase instance_type from t3.medium to t3.large or r5.large to provide more RAM for JVM heap
key_facts: JVM heap at 98.7% (1984 MB / 2010 MB) before crash
GC pauses escalating: 4821 ms → 8304 ms
java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: GC overhead limit exceeded on 3 worker threads
batch processing 15,000 transactions triggered memory pressure
t3.medium has 4 GB RAM — insufficient for this JVM workload

D2.description: Disk full — no space left on device
log_lines: 2026-04-11 13:58:21 INFO  nginx - worker process started
2026-04-11 14:01:14 WARN  logrotate - /var/log/nginx/access.log: disk usage at 89%
2026-04-11 14:03:55 WARN  system - Disk usage at 94% on /dev/xvda1
2026-04-11 14:05:31 ERROR nginx - open() '/var/log/nginx/access.log' failed (28: No space left on device)
2026-04-11 14:05:31 ERROR nginx - open() '/var/log/nginx/error.log' failed (28: No space left on device)
2026-04-11 14:05:32 ERROR system - No space left on device — write failed on /dev/xvda1
2026-04-11 14:06:01 ERROR sshd - error: Could not write entropy file: No space left on device
2026-04-11 14:06:44 ERROR kernel - EXT4-fs error (device xvda1): ext4_find_entry: No space left on device
2026-04-11 14:07:02 CRIT  system - System call failed: No space left on device
2026-04-11 14:07:38 ERROR nginx - worker process exited on signal 6
2026-04-11 14:07:41 CRIT  nginx - worker processes failed to start

llm_evaluation.expected_root_cause: Root volume disk exhaustion from log accumulation
llm_evaluation.expected_remediation: EBS volume expansion or log rotation policy
llm_evaluation.terraform_change: Increase root_block_device volume_size from 8 GB to at least 30 GB on nginx-web-server-01
key_facts: root volume /dev/xvda1 filled to 100% — nginx could not write logs
8 GB root volume is far too small for a production nginx server
disk at 89% warning → 94% warning → full in under 10 minutes
EXT4-fs error confirms filesystem-level write failure
log rotation was running but could not keep up

D3.description: CPU credit exhaustion on burstable instance
log_lines: 2026-04-11 16:30:12 INFO  app - Request throughput: 1240 req/s
2026-04-11 16:31:45 WARN  system - CPUCreditBalance: 48.3 (dropping)
2026-04-11 16:33:20 WARN  system - CPUCreditBalance: 12.7 — critical threshold
2026-04-11 16:34:01 WARN  app - Response latency P99: 4820ms (threshold: 500ms)
2026-04-11 16:34:33 ERROR system - CPUCreditBalance: 0 — CPU now throttled to baseline (20%)
2026-04-11 16:34:34 ERROR app - Request queue depth: 8420 — workers cannot keep up
2026-04-11 16:35:01 ERROR app - Connection timeout: upstream response exceeded 30s
2026-04-11 16:35:01 ERROR app - Connection timeout: upstream response exceeded 30s
2026-04-11 16:35:02 ERROR app - Connection timeout: upstream response exceeded 30s
2026-04-11 16:40:11 CRIT  app - Health check failed: /health returned 504 Gateway Timeout
2026-04-11 16:44:07 CRIT  system - Process unresponsive — StatusCheck failed

llm_evaluation.expected_root_cause: T3 CPU credit balance depleted — instance throttled to baseline performance
llm_evaluation.expected_remediation: Switch from t3 burstable to fixed-performance instance type (e.g. c5)
llm_evaluation.terraform_change: Change instance_type from t3.medium to c5.large — fixed-performance instance, NOT t3.unlimited
key_facts: CPUCreditBalance dropped from 48.3 → 12.7 → 0 over 14 minutes
CPU throttled to 20% baseline after credits exhausted
request queue depth reached 8,420 — workers could not keep up
P99 latency jumped to 4820 ms (threshold 500 ms)
fix must be fixed-performance instance (c5/m5) — t3.unlimited still uses credits

D4.description: Linux OOM killer invoked — process killed by kernel
log_lines: 2026-04-11 21:10:44 INFO  inference - Loading model: bert-large-uncased (1.34 GB)
2026-04-11 21:11:22 INFO  inference - Model loaded. Processing batch queue: 3200 items
2026-04-11 21:12:55 WARN  system - MemAvailable: 214MB — memory pressure high
2026-04-11 21:13:14 WARN  system - MemAvailable: 87MB — critical
2026-04-11 21:13:28 WARN  kernel - kswapd: memory compaction needed
2026-04-11 21:13:41 CRIT  kernel - Out of memory: Kill process 3847 (python3) score 892 or sacrifice child
2026-04-11 21:13:41 CRIT  kernel - Killed process 3847 (python3) total-vm:6842112kB, anon-rss:5901324kB
2026-04-11 21:13:42 ERROR inference - Worker process terminated unexpectedly (signal 9)
2026-04-11 21:13:42 ERROR inference - SIGKILL received — process group 3847 killed by OOM
2026-04-11 21:14:10 ERROR systemd - inference-worker.service: Main process exited, code=killed, status=9/KILL
2026-04-11 21:15:31 CRIT  system - StatusCheck failed: application not responding

llm_evaluation.expected_root_cause: Linux kernel OOM killer terminated the application process due to memory pressure
llm_evaluation.expected_remediation: Instance resize to larger memory type
llm_evaluation.terraform_change: Increase instance_type from t3.large to r5.large or m5.xlarge for ML model inference workload
key_facts: kernel OOM killer invoked: killed process 3847 (python3)
anon-rss 5,901,324 kB (~5.9 GB) — model loaded into anonymous memory
bert-large-uncased model is 1.34 GB; batch of 3,200 items pushed total RAM over limit
t3.large has 8 GB RAM — insufficient for this ML inference workload
SIGKILL signal 9 — not a graceful shutdown, process was forcibly killed by kernel

D5.description: Transient one-time memory spike — OOM killer fired once, self-recovered, instance correctly sized
log_lines: 2026-04-13 03:35:01 INFO  scheduler - Starting monthly report aggregation job (runs once per month)
2026-04-13 03:36:18 INFO  batch - Processing 2.1 million records for end-of-month report
2026-04-13 03:38:44 WARN  system - MemAvailable: 812MB — memory pressure elevated
2026-04-13 03:39:22 CRIT  kernel - Out of memory: Kill process 7291 (python3) score 741 or sacrifice child
2026-04-13 03:39:22 CRIT  kernel - Killed process 7291 (python3) total-vm:3201024kB, anon-rss:2987136kB
2026-04-13 03:39:23 ERROR batch - Worker killed by OOM (signal 9) — retrying job with reduced batch size
2026-04-13 03:39:45 INFO  batch - Retry with batch_size=50000 (was 500000) — memory pressure resolved
2026-04-13 03:40:01 INFO  system - MemAvailable: 24.1GB — memory nominal
2026-04-13 03:40:03 INFO  batch - Processing resumed successfully
2026-04-13 03:40:58 INFO  batch - Monthly report aggregation completed successfully
2026-04-13 03:41:05 INFO  system - StatusCheck passing — instance healthy

llm_evaluation.expected_root_cause: Transient memory spike from a one-time large batch job — not a structural sizing issue
llm_evaluation.expected_remediation: No Terraform change needed — recommend application-level fix (batch job throttling or job scheduling)
key_facts: r5.xlarge has 32 GB RAM — well-provisioned for this workload
OOM was caused by a one-time monthly batch job processing 2.1M records with oversized batch_size=500000
instance self-recovered: retry with batch_size=50000 succeeded, StatusCheck passed
memory returned to 24.1 GB available within 38 seconds
fix is application-level (reduce batch size or add job throttling) — resizing the instance would not prevent recurrence
LLM must NOT suggest a Terraform instance_type change
